name: The Ethiopian Restaurant
tagline:
Colorado's first Ethiopian restaurant since 1985.
Family-owned. Tradition-driven. Flavor-first.
about_paragraphs: Since 1985, The Ethiopian Restaurant has been introducing Denver to the rich, complex flavors of Ethiopian cuisine. We were the first — and we're still the standard.

Every dish is served on injera, our signature spongy sourdough flatbread made fresh daily. Tear off a piece, scoop up a bite of spicy doro wot or tender lamb tibs, and experience food the way it was meant to be shared.
Family-owned and operated for nearly 40 years, we serve traditional recipes passed down through generations. No shortcuts. No fusion. Just authentic Ethiopian food.
menu_subtitle: Traditional Ethiopian dishes served on fresh injera

gallery_images.alt: Traditional Ethiopian vegetarian combo on injera
Ethiopian dishes with lentils, greens, and stews

reviews_list.text: Traditional Ethiopian food with massive proportions for a great price. The injera is always fresh and the doro wot has the perfect level of spice. A Denver institution.
reviews_list.author: Google Reviewer

reviews_list.text: We've been coming here for 10 years. Consistently excellent food, warm service, and an authentic atmosphere you won't find anywhere else in Denver.
reviews_list.author: Long-time Regular

reviews_list.text: First time trying Ethiopian food and this was the perfect introduction. The vegetarian combo was incredible — so many flavors on one plate. Cash only!
reviews_list.author: First-time Visitor
